name: io.github.stagproject/mirelia-patent-market
description: Autonomous A2A patent data marketplace (USPTO/EPO) providing structured JSON. Continuously updated daily. Covers high-demand sectors: AI/ML(G06), CRISPR/MedTech(A61/C12), EV/Solid-state batteries(B60/H01), Robotics/UAV(B25/B64), 6G/IoT(H04), Smart Agri(A01). Includes AI-enriched insights (biz_value_prop, attr_tech_stack, attr_performance). Supports instant on-chain M2M crypto transactions (Base/Polygon USDC, Oasis ROSE) for autonomous R&D and competitor evaluation agents.
